name: Grilled Whole Sea Bass

ingredients.item: small lemon, cut into ¼-inch rounds
Preheat a grill to high heat.
Rub the olive oil all over the fish’s surface and in its middle cavity.
Season liberally with salt and pepper.
Stuff the inner cavity with the thyme, parsley, garlic, and lemon slices.
Set the lavraki on the grill (see Cooking tip). Cook for 6 minutes per side.
Remove the head, backbone, and tail. Carve 2 fillets from each side for serving.
